001/*

003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.part;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.net.*;
023import java.nio.charset.*;
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
027
028/**
029 * An ordered, immutable list of {@link HttpPart} instances that also implements {@link HttpBody} for
030 * URL-encoded form submission.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Use this class to send a {@code application/x-www-form-urlencoded} request body, or to represent
034 * a collection of query parameters, form fields, or path variables.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Create instances via the static factory methods:
038 * <p class='bjava'>
039 *    <jc>// From parts</jc>
040 *    PartList <jv>parts</jv> = PartList.<jsm>of</jsm>(
041 *       HttpPartBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"username"</js>, <js>"alice"</js>),
042 *       HttpPartBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"password"</js>, <js>"secret"</js>)
043 *    );
044 *
045 *    <jc>// From alternating name/value strings</jc>
046 *    PartList <jv>parts2</jv> = PartList.<jsm>ofPairs</jsm>(<js>"username"</js>, <js>"alice"</js>, <js>"password"</js>, <js>"secret"</js>);
047 * </p>
048 *
049 * <p>
050 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
051 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
052 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
053 * (and possibly earlier).
054 *
055 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
056 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
057 * </ul>
058 *
059 * @since 9.2.1
060 */
061@SuppressWarnings({
062   "resource" // OutputStream is owned by caller per HttpBody.writeTo contract; must not be closed here
063})
064public final class PartList implements HttpBody, Iterable<HttpPart> {
065
066   private static final Charset UTF_8 = StandardCharsets.UTF_8;
067
068   private final List<HttpPart> parts;
069
070   private PartList(List<HttpPart> parts) {
071      this.parts = List.copyOf(parts);
072   }
073
074   /**
075    * Creates an empty {@link PartList}.
076    *
077    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
078    */
079   public static PartList empty() {
080      return new PartList(List.of());
081   }
082
083   /**
084    * Creates a {@link PartList} from the given parts.
085    *
086    * @param parts The parts. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
087    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
088    */
089   public static PartList of(HttpPart... parts) {
090      assertArgNotNull("parts", parts);
091      return new PartList(Arrays.asList(parts));
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Creates a {@link PartList} from the given list of parts.
096    *
097    * @param parts The parts. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
098    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
099    */
100   public static PartList of(List<HttpPart> parts) {
101      assertArgNotNull("parts", parts);
102      return new PartList(parts);
103   }
104
105   /**
106    * Creates a {@link PartList} from alternating name/value string pairs.
107    *
108    * <p>
109    * The number of arguments must be even.
110    *
111    * @param pairs Alternating name/value strings. Must not be <jk>null</jk>. Length must be even.
112    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
113    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the number of arguments is odd.
114    */
115   public static PartList ofPairs(String... pairs) {
116      assertArgNotNull("pairs", pairs);
117      if (pairs.length % 2 != 0)
118         throw new IllegalArgumentException("pairs length must be even, got: " + pairs.length);
119      var list = new ArrayList<HttpPart>(pairs.length / 2);
120      for (int i = 0; i < pairs.length; i += 2)
121         list.add(HttpPartBean.of(pairs[i], pairs[i + 1]));
122      return new PartList(list);
123   }
124
125   /**
126    * Returns the parts in this list.
127    *
128    * @return An unmodifiable list of parts. Never <jk>null</jk>.
129    */
130   public List<HttpPart> getParts() {
131      return parts;
132   }
133
134   /**
135    * Returns the first part with the given name (case-sensitive), or <jk>null</jk> if absent.
136    *
137    * @param name The part name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
138    * @return The first matching part, or <jk>null</jk>.
139    */
140   public HttpPart getFirst(String name) {
141      assertArgNotNull("name", name);
142      return parts.stream().filter(p -> name.equals(p.getName())).findFirst().orElse(null);
143   }
144
145   /**
146    * Returns the number of parts in this list.
147    *
148    * @return The number of parts.
149    */
150   public int size() {
151      return parts.size();
152   }
153
154   /**
155    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this list is empty.
156    *
157    * @return <jk>true</jk> if empty.
158    */
159   public boolean isEmpty() {
160      return parts.isEmpty();
161   }
162
163   @Override /* Iterable */
164   public Iterator<HttpPart> iterator() {
165      return parts.iterator();
166   }
167
168   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
169   // HttpBody implementation — for application/x-www-form-urlencoded submission
170   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
171
172   @Override /* HttpBody */
173   public String getContentType() {
174      return "application/x-www-form-urlencoded";
175   }
176
177   @Override /* HttpBody */
178   public long getContentLength() {
179      return -1;
180   }
181
182   @Override /* HttpBody */
183   public boolean isRepeatable() {
184      return true;
185   }
186
187   @Override /* HttpBody */
188   public void writeTo(OutputStream out) throws IOException {
189      assertArgNotNull("out", out);
190      var sb = new StringBuilder();
191      var first = true;
192      for (var part : parts) {
193         var value = part.getValue();
194         if (value == null)
195            continue;
196         if (!first)
197            sb.append('&');
198         sb.append(URLEncoder.encode(part.getName(), UTF_8))
199            .append('=')
200            .append(URLEncoder.encode(value, UTF_8));
201         first = false;
202      }
203      out.write(sb.toString().getBytes(UTF_8));
204   }
205
206   @Override /* Object */
207   public String toString() {
208      var sb = new StringBuilder();
209      var first = true;
210      for (var part : parts) {
211         var value = part.getValue();
212         if (value == null)
213            continue;
214         if (!first)
215            sb.append('&');
216         sb.append(URLEncoder.encode(part.getName(), UTF_8))
217            .append('=')
218            .append(URLEncoder.encode(value, UTF_8));
219         first = false;
220      }
221      return sb.toString();
222   }
223}
